creator: alane@geeksrus.net
text:
xf86cfg attempts to put the screen into a low-res (640x480?) mode for
configuration (the lowest-common-denominator approach).

Monitor will have nothing to do with this; screen goes blank and monitor
displays a little box saying "Video mode not supported".

Fix: 

A suggestion:

The configuration program for XFree86-3.3.6 works with this monitor.
Find whatever the new configuration program does differently in setting
up the display and change it to do it the old way?
How-To-Repeat: 
Run the program on a system with a SyncMaster 760V monitor. (Other TFT
monitors may be similarly affected; anybody else with data points?)
